product_overview: CRM PXX v2 centralizes municipal deals with a single-source-of-truth data model (Municipi -> Deal -> Contactes -> Interaccions) and exposes APIs to support Kanban, calendar/timeline, contacts, municipalities and an AI assistant for deal analysis.
core_goals: Treat each Deal as the epicenter of business activity and provide a complete 360° view via a single aggregator endpoint.
Enforce Municipi as the root entity so Deals and Contactes are always tied to a municipality.
Consolidate all activities (notes, emails, calls) into Interaccions to serve as the single source of truth for timelines and AI queries.
Provide reliable, typed backend endpoints that feed the frontend Kanban, calendar and Deal detail views and support AI-driven summaries and recommendations.

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Verify the API operational status and basic subsystem health.
user_flows: GET /health -> Receive 200 with {status: string, version: string, timestamp: string} (healthy)
GET /health -> Receive 500 with {status: 'error', message: 'database connection failed'} (subsystem degraded)

features.name: Deal Management
features.description: Create and query Deals, provide Kanban-formatted lists and a single aggregated 360° Deal view for the UI.
user_flows: GET /deals/kanban -> Receive 200 with object mapping columns to deal lists (happy path)
GET /deals/kanban -> Receive 500 with error message (service/db error)
POST /deals with body {municipi_id: 'M123', estat: 'open', pla_tipus: 'Mirador', preu_acordat: 5000} -> Receive 200 with created Deal object including id (happy path)
POST /deals with body {estat: 'open', pla_tipus: 'Mirador'} (missing municipi_id) -> Receive 422 with validation errors (validation error)
GET /deals/{deal_id}/full -> Receive 200 with aggregated 360 view object (deal details, municipi, contactes, interaccions) (happy path)
GET /deals/{deal_id}/full (non-existent deal_id) -> Receive 404 with not found message (error path)

features.name: Contacts Management
features.description: List and create Contactes (municipal contacts) tied to Municipi.
user_flows: GET /contactes -> Receive 200 with array of contacts (happy path)
GET /contactes -> Receive 500 with error message (db error)
POST /contactes with body {municipi_id: 'M123', name: 'Joan', role: 'Regidor', email: 'joan@example.com'} -> Receive 200 with created contact object (happy path)
POST /contactes with body {name: 'Anna'} (missing municipi_id) -> Receive 422 with validation errors (validation error)

features.name: Municipalities Management
features.description: Provide the master list of Municipis (the root entity for the system).
user_flows: GET /municipis -> Receive 200 with list of municipalities (happy path)
GET /municipis -> Receive 500 with error message (db connection or query failure)

features.name: Calendar & Timeline (Interaccions)
features.description: Expose calendar events for scheduling and record Interaccions (notes, emails, calls) as the timeline of activity for Deals.
user_flows: GET /calendar/events?start=2026-04-01&end=2026-04-30 -> Receive 200 with events array formatted for react-big-calendar (happy path)
GET /calendar/events?start=invalid&end=2026-04-30 -> Receive 400 with validation error (invalid query parameters)
POST /interaccions with body {deal_id: 'D456', type: 'note', content: 'Site visit scheduled', timestamp: '2026-04-20T10:00:00Z'} -> Receive 200 with created interaction object (happy path)
POST /interaccions with body {type: 'note', content: 'Missing deal_id'} -> Receive 422 with validation error (validation error)
POST /interaccions with body {deal_id: 'nonexistent'} -> Receive 404 with not found (linked deal not found)

features.name: AI Agent
features.description: Ask the Kimi AI agent about a specific Deal; the agent reads Interaccions and Deal data to provide summaries, recommendations and draft text.
user_flows: POST /agent/deals/{deal_id}/ask with body {question: 'Summarize the current status and recommended next steps.'} -> Receive 200 with agent response object (summary, key facts, suggestions) (happy path)
POST /agent/deals/{deal_id}/ask with body {question: ''} -> Receive 400 with validation error (empty question)
POST /agent/deals/{deal_id}/ask (non-existent deal_id) with body {question: 'Status'} -> Receive 404 with not found message (error path)
POST /agent/deals/{deal_id}/ask with body {question: 'Analyze budget risk'} -> Receive 503 with {error: 'AI backend unavailable'} (AI provider outage)

tech_stack: SQLite (aiosqlite) for local / PostgreSQL for prod

endpoints.description: List deals formatted for Kanban board
Get full 360 view of a deal
Ask Kimi AI about a specific deal
